skill.name: Steel Bones
skill.description:
Gatotkaca gains Physical Defense equal to 2% of his lost HP (up to 200). For every 300 damage he takes (calculated before damage reduction), he gains 5 Rage (up to 100).

Upon reaching over 25 Rage, Gatotkaca's next Basic Attack becomes enhanced, consuming all Rage to deal extra <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and recover HP. The extra damage scales with his Rage, level, and Magic Power.

skill.name: Blast Iron Fist
skill.description: Gatotkaca slams the ground, creating a shattered zone in the target direction while dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+150% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies within. Enemies in the shattered zone will take 100<font color="62f8fe"> (+20% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> per second and be slowed by 30%.

skill.name: Unbreakable
skill.description: Gatotkaca begins channeling, then sprints in the target direction with a battle cry, taunting enemies on the path to attack him, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> for 0.9 - 1.5s. The taunt duration and sprint distance scale with the channel time. Canceling the skill reduces 50% of the remaining cooldown.

skill.name: Avatar of the Guardian
skill.description:
Gatotkaca jumps to the target location, dealing 500<font color="62f8fe"> (+300% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to nearby enemies and knocking them airborne for 1s. Enemies near the center of the area will be knocked airborne for a longer duration, while enemies on the fringes will be pulled to the center.

The camera will move with the skill indicator but won't grant extra sight.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Gatotkaca's Ultimate to dive into the enemy team, then use his 2nd Skill to taunt them, and slow them with his 1st Skill before finishing with Basic Attacks.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Gatotkaca's 2nd Skill to CC the enemy by charging up to extend the range while aiming, then follow up with his 1st Skill and Basic Attacks.
